user.title: Virtual Ducted Thermostat - entities definition
user.description: Define entities connected to the thermostat. Documentation at https://github.com/thecowan/climate.virtual_ducted_thermostat

data.name: Name
data.central_climate: Underlying climate controller (e.g. central Daikin unit)

temperatures.title: Virtual Ducted Thermostat - temperature definition
temperatures.description: Define min and max temperature and the delta activation thresholds. Documentation at https://github.com/thecowan/climate.virtual_ducted_thermostat

data.parasitic_tolerance: Reduced activation temperature delta when another climate is already on (to save cycles)

error.name: Choose a name
error.central climate wrong: Central climate entity is incorrect or invalid
error.min_temp: Min temperature has to be lower then max one
error.tolerance: Activation delta has to be positive, lower then min temperature
error.parasitic_tolerance: Parasitic activation delta has to be positive, and lower than the normal activation delta
error.related climate: Climate entity that you want to connect is not valid or not existing
error.duration error: Time delta format is wrong. accepted format are hh:mm:ss or mm:ss
error.missing_data: Missing data. All data of this form are mandatry

init.title: Virtual Ducted Thermostat - entities definition
init.description: Define entities connected to the thermostat. Documentation at https://github.com/thecowan/climate.virtual_ducted_thermostat

data.name: Name
data.heater: Heaters (comma separated name of entities) - null to keep it empty
data.cooler: Coolers (comma separated name of entities) - null to keep it empty

temperatures.title: Virtual Ducted Thermostat - temperature definition
temperatures.description: Define min and max temperature and the delta activation. Documentation at https://github.com/thecowan/climate.virtual_ducted_thermostat

data.tolerance: Activation temperature delta (tenth has to different from 0)

data.initial_hvac_mode: Startup mode - null to keep it empty
data.related_climate: Climate entity connect to this one (comma separated name of entities) - null to keep it empty
data.min_cycle_duration: Minimum cycle duration (hh:mm:ss or mm:ss) - null to keep it empty

error.name: Choose a name
error.central climate wrong: Central climate entity is wrong or does not exist as an HA entity
error.min_temp: Min temperature has to be lower then max one
error.tolerance: Activation delta has to be positive, lower then min temperature and with tenth different from 0
error.parasitic tolerance: Parastic tolerance has to be positive and lower than or equal to tolerance
error.related climate: Climate entity that you want to connect is not valid or not existing
error.duration error: Time delta format is wrong. accepted format are hh:mm:ss or mm:ss
error.sensor wrong: Room temperature sensor is not existing into Home Assistant
error.target wrong: Plannned temperature sensor is not existing into Home Assistant
error.missing_data: Missing data. All data of this form are mandatry
